title: Application of Objectives
full_text:
2.1.1.2 Application of Objectives
Application of Objectives
1) The objectives described in this Part apply
  a) to all buildings covered in this Code (see Article 1.1.1.1.), and
  b) only to the extent that they relate to compliance with this Code as required
in Article 1.2.1.1.

sentences.text: The objectives described in this Part apply

clauses.text: to all buildings covered in this Code (see Article 1.1.1.1.), and
only to the extent that they relate to compliance with this Code as required in Article 1.2.1.1.
